untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'confirmed panic event or forced liquidation announcement' (external news event), '3+ broken support levels' (requires multi-level support tracking not available in single-bar indicators), and 'first candle close above lowest cascade price' (requires order flow/cascade tracking not in allowed indicators). These conditions cannot be expressed using only the allowed OHLCV and technical indicators provided.
translation_notes: Translated achievable conditions: vol_ratio_20 > 1.5 approximates 150% volume spike threshold; bb_bandwidth > 2.0 approximates spread widening beyond 2 standard deviations; close stabilization signals (above/below prev extremes) approximate cascade stabilization. Exit at 50% reversion approximated as 5% return threshold given decimal scale. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per signal specification. Support level breaks and panic confirmation require external data feeds beyond technical indicators.
